# nirvana_nks_cluster (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nirvana_nks_cluster" "example_nks_cluster" {
  cluster_id = "cluster_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `find_one_by` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--find_one_by))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the Cluster was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the Cluster.
- `pool_ids` (List of String) IDs of pools belonging to this Cluster.
- `private_ip` (String) Private IP (VIP) of the Cluster.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID the Cluster belongs to.
- `public_ip` (String) Public IP of the Cluster.
- `region` (String) Region the resource is in.
Available values: "us-sea-1", "us-sva-1", "us-sva-2", "us-chi-1", "ap-sin-1".
- `status` (String) Status of the resource.
Available values: "pending", "creating", "updating", "ready", "deleting", "deleted", "error".
- `tags` (List of String) Tags attached to the Cluster.
- `updated_at` (String) When the Cluster was last updated.
- `vpc_id` (String) ID of the VPC the Cluster is in.

<a id="nestedatt--find_one_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `find_one_by`

Required:

- `project_id` (String) Project ID of resources to request
